## Summary

<!-- One-line description of what this PR does and why. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (config / entity / API)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation only
- [ ] 🧪 Tests / CI only
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `pytest` locally and all tests pass
- [ ] I added tests for the new behavior (or documented why that's not feasible)
- [ ] `hassfest` and `HACS action` still pass on my branch
- [ ] README / CHANGELOG updated if user-visible behavior changes
- [ ] No secrets (NetKey / AppKey / DevKey / `.connect` blob) in tests, fixtures, logs, or commit messages
- [ ] Commit messages follow the project's conventional-commits style (`feat(…)`, `fix(…)`, `docs(…)`, …)
